subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The face of the Wronged One hath turned toward thee from this Station, and remembereth thee with a remembrance from which fragrance doth waft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد اقبل الیک وجه المظلوم من  هذالمقام  و یذکرک بذکر یتضوع منه عرف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God
